decisions.summary: Replace mas-sequential-thinking with Zen MCP for multi-model reasoning
decisions.rationale: Empirical testing showed mas-sequential-thinking returning MCP errors consistently, while Zen MCP (v9.0.3) is fully operational with o3-mini, gpt-5, and gpt-5-mini models. Zen provides thinkdeep, planner, consensus, debug, and codereview tools with multi-model validation.
decisions.implementation: Updated SuperClaude commands to use zen/thinkdeep for analysis, zen/planner for implementation planning, zen/consensus for architectural decisions, zen/debug for troubleshooting, and zen/codereview for quality validation.

decisions.summary: Integrate SuperClaude framework with Dopemux MCP servers
decisions.rationale: SuperClaude provides 16 specialized personas and 25+ slash commands that need integration with Dopemux's enhanced MCP suite (Zen, ConPort, Serena, Context7, Exa, GPT-Researcher) for optimal ADHD-optimized development workflows.
decisions.implementation: Created comprehensive MCP documentation in .claude/ directory, mapped SuperClaude commands to MCP tools, documented tool selection patterns, and established integration patterns for each workflow type.

decisions.summary: Implement ConPort Knowledge Graph for persistent context preservation
decisions.rationale: ADHD developers need reliable context preservation across interruptions. ConPort provides PostgreSQL-based knowledge graph with decision logging, progress tracking, system patterns, and relationship genealogy. Performance targets exceeded by 19-135x.
decisions.implementation: Deployed PostgreSQL with AGE extension on port 5455, implemented 9 core API operations (decisions, progress, patterns, custom_data, semantic_search, linked_items), added ADHD metadata (complexity scoring, energy matching, cognitive load), and integrated with session lifecycle management.

decisions.summary: Add Serena v2 with Tree-sitter and LSP integration
decisions.rationale: ADHD developers need fast, progressive code navigation without cognitive overwhelm. Serena v2 combines LSP standard operations with Tree-sitter parsing, relationship graphs, and ADHD accommodations (max 10 results, 3-level depth, progressive disclosure).
decisions.implementation: Integrated 26 LSP tools, added Tree-sitter for Python/JS/TS/Go/Rust, implemented PostgreSQL relationship tracking, Redis caching (1.76ms retrieval), complexity scoring (0.0-1.0), and auto-workspace detection (0.37ms).

decisions.rationale: Context switching is cognitively expensive for ADHD developers. Git worktrees allow multiple branches in separate directories, enabling pause/resume without mental overhead of stashing and switching.
decisions.implementation: Added 'dopemux worktrees' commands: list (show all with status), switch (move between worktrees), cleanup (remove unused with --force and --dry-run). Each worktree maintains independent state with clear physical boundaries.

decisions.summary: Design two-plane architecture with Integration Bridge coordination
decisions.rationale: Separate PM concerns (status, tasks, team visibility) from cognitive concerns (decisions, code, memory) with clear authority boundaries. Integration Bridge enforces no direct cross-plane communication, routing all events through authoritative systems.
decisions.implementation: PM Plane: Leantime (status authority), Task-Master (PRD parsing), Task-Orchestrator (37 tools). Cognitive Plane: Serena (code navigation), ConPort (decisions/memory). Integration Bridge at PORT_BASE+16 for event routing and conflict resolution.

relationships.description: Zen MCP integration extends SuperClaude framework integration
SuperClaude integration implements ConPort for memory management
SuperClaude integration implements Serena for code intelligence
ConPort builds upon two-plane architecture as cognitive plane component
Serena builds upon two-plane architecture as cognitive plane component
Worktree system supports two-plane architecture by enabling parallel development
